title: Forge Boost
description: Forge Boost is a powerful FPS-boosting Minecraft mod pack that reduces lag, improves performance, and delivers a smoother gameplay experience on all PCs! 🚀
body:
# **Forge Boost – The Ultimate FPS & Performance Modpack** 🚀  

**Forge Boost** is a **high-performance Minecraft modpack** designed to **maximize FPS, reduce lag, and enhance gameplay stability**. Built for **Forge**, this pack is optimized for **seamless performance on both low-end and high-end PCs**, ensuring a **smooth and responsive gaming experience**.  

## **🔧 Why Choose Forge Boost?**  
✔ **Ultra-Fast Performance** – Experience **higher FPS** with optimized rendering, reduced memory usage, and smart culling techniques.  
✔ **Smoother Gameplay** – Say goodbye to **stutters, lag spikes, and frame drops** with advanced performance mods.  
✔ **Optimized for All PCs** – Whether you have a **low-end laptop or a powerful gaming rig**, this pack delivers **unmatched efficiency**.  
✔ **Forge Compatibility** – Designed to work seamlessly with **Forge mods** for future-proof performance.  
✔ **Shader & Visual Enhancements** – Enjoy **beautiful graphics with Iris Shaders**, without compromising FPS.  
✔ **Better Multiplayer Experience** – Includes **No Chat Reports** for a safer, private multiplayer environment.  

## **⚡ Key Features & Included Mods**  
🔹 **Sodium + Sodium Extra** – Boosts FPS and provides extensive graphics settings.  
🔹 **Lithium** – Optimizes game physics, AI, and world ticking for **lag-free performance**.  
🔹 **ModernFix + FerriteCore** – Reduces RAM usage and **improves memory management**.  
🔹 **Entity Culling + More Culling** – Eliminates **unnecessary rendering** to enhance FPS.  
🔹 **ImmediatelyFast** – Speeds up chunk rendering for **a smoother experience**.  
🔹 **Iris Shaders** – Enables **shader support** without performance loss.  
🔹 **Reese’s Sodium Options** – Unlocks **advanced settings** for complete control over your FPS.  
🔹 **No Chat Reports** – Protects **your privacy in multiplayer servers**.  

## **📥 Download & Play Now!**  
Boost your **Minecraft performance** today with **Forge Boost** – the **ultimate optimization modpack** for **higher FPS, smoother gameplay, and a lag-free experience**.
